scripts.postinstall: npm run generate --workspace @matflow/database && npm run generate --workspace @matflow/backend-modules
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @matflow/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @matflow/shared-utils && npm run build --workspace @matflow/backend-modules && npm run build --workspace @matflow/api && npm run build --workspace @matflow/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @matflow/api && npm run test --workspace @matflow/web
